summary: Completed testing of Dice Roll History and AI Session Planner features. Backend APIs all working (100% pass). Frontend UI components verified - AI Planner tab visible with Session Outline and Session Replay modes, all inputs present. Dice Roll History toggle confirmed working on Player Character Sheet.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. GM Screen URL is /gm-screen/{campaignId} not /campaign/{campaignId}/gm. DiceRollHistory component only renders when history.length > 0 (after at least one dice roll). AI Planner tab in GM Screen sidebar has Session Outline and Session Replay modes with all required inputs.

dice_roll_history_player_page.share_roll_button_on_crits: Component code shows Share button appears for isCrit or isFumble rolls

dice_roll_history_gm_page.note: Toggle only visible after at least one dice roll (history.length > 0)
